goal: Clean-room baseline for CTOX built on vendored codex-cli plus the forked ctox-vllm-serve engine.

dependencies.name: openai-codex
dependencies.purpose: Canonical codex-cli and codex-rs baseline for the execution loop and tool contract.

dependencies.name: ctox-vllm-serve
dependencies.purpose: Forked CTOX local runtime and OpenAI-compatible server for the verified GPT-OSS and Qwen3.5 families.

notes: The codex-cli baseline must remain on /v1/responses.
The compatibility layer may rewrite or filter tool schemas so the CTOX vllm-serve engine accepts the official codex request shape.
Qwen3.5 support must cover local image-path, URL, or base64 image inputs as supported by the CTOX vllm-serve engine.
The first clean-room version keeps codex-cli as the execution baseline and adds family-specific runtime execution for Qwen3.5.

compatibilityTests.name: execution_baseline_rust_unit_tests
compatibilityTests.purpose: Verify in Rust that codex-cli tool requests, runtime plans, and vllm-serve response rewrites stay compatible with the clean-room baseline.
